message:
That irresistible "puppy-dog eyes" look? It's not just in your head. 🐶 Dogs actually evolved a tiny muscle above their eyes that wolves don't have — it lets them lift their inner eyebrows and make their eyes look bigger and more soulful. It's the exact expression that melts human hearts, and scientists think thousands of years of living beside us literally reshaped their faces to talk to us. 🥺❤️

Tag someone who can NEVER say no to those eyes! 👀
